headline: XRP Price Prediction: We Asked ChatGPT What XRP Will Be Worth If the CLARITY Act Passes
summary: If you hold XRP (CRYPTO: XRP), you’ve watched every catalyst get checked off in 2026, but the XRP price has dropped despite it all. From the SEC’s commodity classification to Goldman Sachs loading up XRP ETFs, and Mastercard adding Ripple to its payments network—nothing has moved the XRP price up. The XRP price is hovering ... XRP Price Prediction: We Asked ChatGPT What XRP Will Be Worth If the CLARITY Act Passes

headline: Card volume rises with digital boost
summary: Volume on Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover cards issued in the U.S. climbed 6.4% last year over 2024, with an assist from digital plays, according to Nilson Report’s publisher.

raw.headline: Card volume rises with digital boost
raw.summary: Volume on Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover cards issued in the U.S. climbed 6.4% last year over 2024, with an assist from digital plays, according to Nilson Report’s publisher.

headline: Amazon makes new move into credit cards
summary: Here comes Amazon (AMZN) with another move beyond just carts. This time it's targeting a crucial group: small businesses. The tech goliath just announced a new partnership with U.S. Bank and Mastercard to launch a fresh lineup of business credit cards this spring. It's not just another product ...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Mastercard (MA) Pivot Toward Digital Assets And Core Network Partnerships
summary: In recent weeks, Mastercard announced plans to sell its recently acquired Nets real-time payments unit, which generates about US$370 million in annual revenue, while also closing the acquisition of stablecoin platform BVNK and expanding its role as the network behind new Amazon–U.S. Bank small business credit cards. Together, the Nets divestment, BVNK deal and Amazon partnership highlight Mastercard’s pivot toward higher-margin digital asset infrastructure and services while doubling down on...
